payload.description: B41 bus route on Flatbush Avenue; proposed center-running bus lanes would save ~2 minutes per passenger-trip, or 11,675 minutes saved of passenger time per day
B63 bus route; proposed reroute to prevent left-turning B63 from blocking B41 at Atlantic Ave
B45 bus route; proposed terminal swap with B63 to prevent left-turning B63 from blocking B41 on Flatbush Ave
B69 bus route; proposed reroute to prevent turning B69 from blocking B41 on Flatbush Ave

tool_args.label: Center-Running Bus Lanes on Flatbush Avenue

payload.location_text: Flatbush Avenue from Livingston Street to Grand Army Plaza, Brooklyn
payload.description: Physically-separated center-running bus lanes providing near level boarding platforms, minimizing bus-vehicle conflicts and bus lane blockages

normalized_location.raw_text: Flatbush Avenue from Livingston Street to Grand Army Plaza, Brooklyn

tool_args.label: Bus Boarding Islands on Flatbush Avenue

payload.location_text: Flatbush Avenue, concentrated at Atlantic Av/Barclays Center, Bergen St, and 7th Av
payload.description: 6 new concrete bus boarding islands, adding 13,000+ ft2 of concrete pedestrian space; consolidating 6 of 12 existing curbside bus stops onto boarding islands

normalized_location.raw_text: Flatbush Avenue, concentrated at Atlantic Av/Barclays Center, Bergen St, and 7th Av

tool_args.label: Proposed Curb Management Plan on Flatbush Avenue

payload.location_text: Flatbush Avenue between Dean Street and Grand Army Plaza
payload.description: Proposed curb regulations: Weekdays 7am-8am No Standing, 8am-4pm Truck Loading, 4pm-10pm 2-Hour Metered Parking; Saturdays 7am-8am No Standing, 8am-10pm 2-Hour Metered Parking; 17 new dedicated loading zones

normalized_location.raw_text: Flatbush Avenue between Dean Street and Grand Army Plaza

tool_args.label: Pedestrian Safety Improvements on Flatbush Avenue

payload.description: Adds 15,800 ft2 of painted pedestrian space; daylights and shortens crossing distances at 13 intersections; curb extensions and bus islands; hardened curb extensions to prevent truck incursions

tool_args.label: Roadway Bike Parking on Flatbush Avenue

payload.description: Up to 10 new roadway bike parking areas which can fit 150+ bikes

tool_args.label: Dedicated Loading Zones on Flatbush Avenue

payload.description: 17 new dedicated loading zones, which can fit over 70 trucks or 112 passenger vehicles
Kick-off public town hall for Flatbush Avenue bus priority
First Community Advisory Board meeting for Flatbush Avenue bus priority
Second Community Advisory Board meeting; presented design options for northern section
Presentations to Community Boards 2, 6, 8 on design options for northern section
Presentations to Community Boards 2, 6, 8 on center-running bus lane proposal for northern section
Install bus lane markings north of 4th Av; install painted curb extensions where feasible
Begin concrete and signal construction; construction phasing completed by direction of travel
Complete concrete and signal construction; install final roadway markings; re-route buses as necessary
